name: Universal Premium — Stuck in the '90s
subject: Is your laser software stuck in the '90s?
preheader: Four programs, two file formats, one prayer. There's a better way — for any laser.
note: Universal Premium conquest campaign (Closed-Lost audience, non-GF owners). Batch send like 'Universal Premium Soft Launch 4' (214451319588); audience = lists 10277 + 4992. Creative from design_mark reddit-90s-ads branch. Drives to shop.glowforge.com/pages/stuck-in-the-90s. Look = 90s campaign brand (teal/cream/cobalt/coral, Inter), NOT the Premium-purple trial drip.
